content.full_text:
January 7, 1977

Mrs. Gail Bridwell  
President  
El Toro Republican Women Federated  
P.O. Box 1055  
Morgan Hill, California 95037

Dear Mrs. Bridwell:

Thank you for your letter of January 3 asking whether or not your organization has filing obligations under the Political Reform Act.

Section 82013 of the Act defines committees as "Any person or combination of persons who directly or indirectly receives contributions or makes expenditures or contributions for the purpose of influencing or attempting to influence the action of the voters for or against the nomination or election of one or more candidates, or the passage or defeat of any measure, including any committee or subcommittee of a political party, whether national, state, local, if:

a) contributions received total $500 or more in a calendar year;

b) expenditures and contributions made, other than contributions described in subsection (c), total $500 or more in a calendar year;

c) contributions of cash, checks and other cash equivalents paid directly to candidates and committees total $5,000 or more in a calendar year."

Since the El Toro Republican Women Federated has not raised or spent $500 or if it has not made in-kind contributions of $500 or more within a calendar year, it does not have filing obligations at this time.

I apologize for any inconvenience caused you and if I can be of further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Very truly yours,

REGINA SICILIANO KUTCHINS  
Technical Assistance Program Coordinator

El Toro Republican Women Federated  
P.O. Box 1055  
Morgan Hill, California 95037

January 3, 1977

Fair Political Practices Comm.  
1100 K Street  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Sir:

I phoned your office this morning however I was unable to complete the call due to a hold up on your end.

As I understand, our organization is supposed to fill out a form if we made $500 or more over the past year, or if we contributed to the campaign funds of any of the candidates. The fact is we raised about $200 in our small group and most of it covered expenses and some went to our student scholarship funds. We did not support any of the candidates.

If we still have to send a form to you, would you please send us one to the above address.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Mrs. Gail Bridwell  
President
